name: Bittersweet Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1-2 Tablespoons Hot Water (adjust for desired consistency)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a small saucepan, melt chocolate over hot (not boiling) water, stirring until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and baking powder; set aside.
4. Dissolve instant coffee in 2 cups of hot water; add cold water to reach 1-1/2 cups total.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and butter with vanilla until creamy.
6. Beat in eggs one at a time, then continue beating on high speed for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in melted chocolate. Gradually mix in the flour mixture and coffee mixture alternately.
8. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch Bundt pan or angel food cake pan.
9. Bake for 65-70 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in the pan for 30 minutes, then remove from the pan and cool completely.
11. For the glaze, melt chocolate over hot (not boiling) water, stirring until smooth.
12. In a small bowl, combine melted chocolate, confectioners' sugar, butter, and vanilla; beat on low speed until smooth.
13. Gradually add hot water to reach desired consistency.
14. Drizzle glaze over the cooled cake.
